module_o.description: This component is part of the PANDA/BAMBU IP LIBRARY

NP_functionality.LIBRARY: minimal_noc i i_valid i_bp o o_valid o_bp REGISTERED N_NODES_COL N_NODES BITSIZE_DATA BITSIZE_ADDR BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT
NP_functionality.VERILOG_PROVIDED:
parameter nlevel = $clog2(N_NODES_COL); function integer FLIP_BIT; input integer level; input integer address; begin FLIP_BIT = address ^ (1 << level); end endfunction wire [BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_DATA-1:0] i_inside [0:N_NODES_COL-1][0:nlevel-1]; wire inside_valid [0:N_NODES_COL-1][0:nlevel-1]; wire [BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_DATA-1:0] outside [0:N_NODES_COL-1][0:nlevel-1]; wire outside_valid [0:N_NODES_COL-1][0:nlevel-1];
generate genvar column; for (column = 0; column < N_NODES_COL; column = column + 1) begin : column_inst genvar level; for (level = 1; level < nlevel; level = level + 1) begin : lev if(column+level*N_NODES_COL < N_NODES) begin if(column[nlevel-level-1]) begin : io_node_n_1 io_node6 #(.BITSIZE_i(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_inside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_outside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_0(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_1(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_ADDR(BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR), .BITSIZE_DATA(BITSIZE_DATA), .LEVEL(nlevel-level-1), .REGISTERED(1), .ADDRESS(column+level*N_NODES_COL)) io_node6_inst_1 (.clock(clock), .reset(reset), .i(i[(column+level*N_NODES_COL)*BITSIZE_i+:BITSIZE_i]), .i_valid(i_valid[column+level*N_NODES_COL]), .i_bp(i_bp[column+level*N_NODES_COL]), .i_inside(i_inside[column][level-1]), .i_inside_valid(inside_valid[column][level-1]), .i_outside(outside[column][level-1]), .i_outside_valid(outside_valid[column][level-1]), .o(o[(column+level*N_NODES_COL)*BITSIZE_o+:BITSIZE_o]), .o_valid(o_valid[column+level*N_NODES_COL]), .o_0(outside[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1-level,column)][level]), .o_0_valid(outside_valid[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1-level,column)][level]), .o_bp(o_bp[column+level*N_NODES_COL]), .o_1(i_inside[column][level]), .o_1_valid(inside_valid[column][level])); end else begin : io_node_n_0 io_node6 #(.BITSIZE_i(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_inside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_outside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_0(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_1(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_ADDR(BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR), .BITSIZE_DATA(BITSIZE_DATA), .LEVEL(nlevel-level-1), .REGISTERED(1), .ADDRESS(column+level*N_NODES_COL)) io_node6_inst_0 (.clock(clock), .reset(reset), .i(i[(column+level*N_NODES_COL)*BITSIZE_i+:BITSIZE_i]), .i_valid(i_valid[column+level*N_NODES_COL]), .i_bp(i_bp[column+level*N_NODES_COL]), .i_inside(i_inside[column][level-1]), .i_inside_valid(inside_valid[column][level-1]), .i_outside(outside[column][level-1]), .i_outside_valid(outside_valid[column][level-1]), .o(o[(column+level*N_NODES_COL)*BITSIZE_o+:BITSIZE_o]), .o_valid(o_valid[column+level*N_NODES_COL]), .o_0(i_inside[column][level]), .o_0_valid(inside_valid[column][level]), .o_bp(o_bp[column+level*N_NODES_COL]), .o_1(outside[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1-level,column)][level]), .o_1_valid(outside_valid[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1-level,column)][level])); end end else begin if(column[nlevel-level-1]) begin : mid_1 middle_node #(.BITSIZE_i_inside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_outside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_0(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_1(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_ADDR(BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR), .BITSIZE_DATA(BITSIZE_DATA), .LEVEL(nlevel-level-1), .REGISTERED(REGISTERED)) middle_node_inst_1 (.clock(clock), .i_inside(i_inside[column][level-1]), .i_inside_valid(inside_valid[column][level-1]), .i_outside(outside[column][level-1]), .i_outside_valid(outside_valid[column][level-1]), .o_0(outside[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1-level,column)][level]), .o_0_valid(outside_valid[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1-level,column)][level]), .o_1(i_inside[column][level]), .o_1_valid(inside_valid[column][level])); end else begin : mid_0 middle_node #(.BITSIZE_i_inside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_outside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_0(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_1(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_ADDR(BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR), .BITSIZE_DATA(BITSIZE_DATA), .LEVEL(nlevel-level-1), .REGISTERED(REGISTERED)) middle_node_inst_0 (.clock(clock), .i_inside(i_inside[column][level-1]), .i_inside_valid(inside_valid[column][level-1]), .i_outside(outside[column][level-1]), .i_outside_valid(outside_valid[column][level-1]), .o_0(i_inside[column][level]), .o_0_valid(inside_valid[column][level]), .o_1(outside[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1-level,column)][level] ), .o_1_valid(outside_valid[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1-level,column)][level])); end end end if(column < N_NODES) begin if(column[nlevel-1]) begin : io_node_1 io_node6 #(.BITSIZE_i(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_inside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_outside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_0(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_1(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_ADDR(BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR), .BITSIZE_DATA(BITSIZE_DATA), .LEVEL(nlevel-1), .REGISTERED(1), .ADDRESS(column)) io_node6_inst_1 (.clock(clock), .reset(reset), .i(i[column*BITSIZE_i+:BITSIZE_i]), .i_valid(i_valid[column]), .i_bp(i_bp[column]), .i_inside(i_inside[column][nlevel-1]), .i_inside_valid(inside_valid[column][nlevel-1]), .i_outside(outside[column][nlevel-1]), .i_outside_valid(outside_valid[column][nlevel-1]), .o(o[column*BITSIZE_o+:BITSIZE_o]), .o_valid(o_valid[column]), .o_bp(o_bp[column]), .o_0(outside[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1,column)][0]), .o_0_valid(outside_valid[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1,column)][0]), .o_1(i_inside[column][0]), .o_1_valid(inside_valid[column][0])); end else begin : io_node_0 io_node6 #(.BITSIZE_i(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_inside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_outside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_0(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_1(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_ADDR(BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR), .BITSIZE_DATA(BITSIZE_DATA), .LEVEL(nlevel-1), .REGISTERED(1), .ADDRESS(column)) io_node6_inst_0 (.clock(clock), .reset(reset), .i(i[column*BITSIZE_i+:BITSIZE_i]), .i_valid(i_valid[column]), .i_bp(i_bp[column]), .i_inside(i_inside[column][nlevel-1]), .i_inside_valid(inside_valid[column][nlevel-1]), .i_outside(outside[column][nlevel-1]), .i_outside_valid(outside_valid[column][nlevel-1]), .o(o[column*BITSIZE_o+:BITSIZE_o]), .o_valid(o_valid[column]), .o_bp(o_bp[column]), .o_0(i_inside[column][0]), .o_0_valid(inside_valid[column][0]), .o_1(outside[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1,column)][0]), .o_1_valid(outside_valid[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1,column)][0])); end end else begin if(column[nlevel-1]) begin : mid_1 middle_node #(.BITSIZE_i_inside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_outside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_0(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_1(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_ADDR(BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR), .BITSIZE_DATA(BITSIZE_DATA), .LEVEL(nlevel-1), .REGISTERED(REGISTERED)) middle_node_inst_1 (.clock(clock), .i_inside(i_inside[column][nlevel-1]), .i_inside_valid(inside_valid[column][nlevel-1]), .i_outside(outside[column][nlevel-1]), .i_outside_valid(outside_valid[column][nlevel-1]), .o_0(outside[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1,column)][0]), .o_0_valid(outside_valid[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1,column)][0]), .o_1(i_inside[column][0]), .o_1_valid(inside_valid[column][0])); end else begin : mid_0 middle_node #(.BITSIZE_i_inside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_i_outside(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_0(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_o_1(BITSIZE_ADDR+BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_DATA), .BITSIZE_ADDR(BITSIZE_ADDR_EXT+BITSIZE_ADDR), .BITSIZE_DATA(BITSIZE_DATA), .LEVEL(nlevel-1), .REGISTERED(REGISTERED)) middle_node_inst_0 (.clock(clock), .i_inside(i_inside[column][nlevel-1]), .i_inside_valid(inside_valid[column][nlevel-1]), .i_outside(outside[column][nlevel-1]), .i_outside_valid(outside_valid[column][nlevel-1]), .o_0(i_inside[column][0]), .o_0_valid(inside_valid[column][0]), .o_1(outside[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1,column)][0] ), .o_1_valid(outside_valid[FLIP_BIT(nlevel-1,column)][0])); end end end endgenerate
